channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-06-17
item.description: 1. Beyond Parallel Trends in Staggered Difference-in-Differences: Identification under Higher-Order Parallelism — Causal Inference · score 56 · arXiv econ.EM · Zecharias Anteneh 2. (6 authors) 3. OmniPlan: An Adaptive Framework for Timely and Near-Optimal Network Planning Optimization — Causal LMs · score 56 · arXiv cs.LG · Longlong Zhu, Jiashuo Yu, Zedi Chen, Yuhan Wu et al.
